user_query: I'm a trader and I'm interested in the MESA Adaptive Moving Average(MAMA) for the symbol AAPL. Can you provide me with the MAMA values using a time interval of 4 hours? Please specify a slow limit of 0.2 and a fast limit of 0.9. Also, I would like to know the list of countries along with their income levels.

TaskList.description: Retrieve MESA Adaptive Moving Average (MAMA) values for AAPL using a 4-hour time interval, with slow limit of 0.2 and fast limit of 0.9.
Fetch a list of countries along with their income levels.
